entry.title: IDC W15P7T04DA003 (P00014) awarded to ONAN CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INCREASE CEILING FOR PHASE II ADVANCED MEDIUM SIZED MOBILE POWER SOURCES (AMMPS) IN THE NTE AMOUNT OF $5,116,044 TO TOTAL CEILING OF $22,569,417 BASED ON CONTRACTORS PROPOSAL DATED 19 MARCH 2009. MODIFICATION ALSO INCLUDES REVISED STATEMENT OF WORK, PURCHASE DESCRIPTION, AND SCHEDULE.
